# setPageCacheSize(_:)

**Instance Method**

Sets the maximum number of pages the receiver can cache.

## Declaration

```swift
func setPageCacheSize(_ size: Int)
```

## Parameters

- **size**: The maximum number of pages that can be cached.

## Discussion

The default page cache size can vary depending on the computer’s configuration. Use [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WebBackForwardList/pageCacheSize()] to get the current setting.

## Page Caching

- **pageCacheSize()**: Returns the maximum number of pages that the receiver can cache.
